meta_title: For Students: client workflow to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering Client Workflows to Debug AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn an advanced client workflow to debug AI apps using Antigravity and Claude Code. A must-read checklist for student developers.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, implement a systematic client-side workflow that isolates state logic from UI rendering. By utilizing Claude Code for iterative diagnostic tracing and Antigravity for automated dependency mapping, you transform opaque errors into actionable architectural insights, ensuring your builds remain resilient, scalable, and production-ready for your portfolio.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank console, the cursor blinking in a rhythmic taunt. Your codebase, once a source of pride, has become a labyrinth of silent failures and cryptic stack traces. As a student builder, you aren't just fighting syntax; you're fighting the invisible wall between an idea and a functioning product.

But here is the secret: debugging isn't a talent; it's a protocol. By adopting a high-level client workflow, you stop guessing and start engineering. We are going to dismantle that wall using industrial-grade tooling—Antigravity and Claude Code—to turn your debugging process into a predictable, repeatable engine of growth.

steps.title: Isolate State Persistence
steps.description: Before fixing logic, you must visualize the state flow. Use Antigravity to map out where your data loses integrity during component lifecycle transitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current state management in this module. Generate a dependency graph showing where the data flow breaks during async calls.

steps.title: Automated Error Tracing
steps.description: Stop manual console logging. Claude Code can inject intelligent telemetry to catch silent failures at the exact point of execution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Insert non-intrusive logging points that capture the payload and current context for every API request in this client.

steps.title: Contract Testing with Mock Data
steps.description: Ensure your UI components handle failures gracefully by simulating edge-case responses before they hit your production backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a mock response suite for the user authentication flow that includes 401, 403, and 500 error scenarios.

steps.title: Dependency Refactoring
steps.description: Bugs often hide in outdated package versions or conflicting dependencies. Use Antigravity to audit your client-side environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit package.json and identify potential version conflicts that could cause runtime instability in a React environment.

steps.title: Final Architectural Verification
steps.description: Perform a final pass to ensure your hotfix hasn't introduced regression errors in secondary components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent changes and verify they align with the original architectural pattern. Point out any potential regressions.

pro_tips: Always treat your console logs as temporary; use Claude Code to strip them before final commits to keep your production logs clean.
If you cannot replicate the bug, you haven't found the state variable causing it; use Antigravity's state-replay feature.
Never fix a bug without writing a corresponding unit test; this ensures your portfolio project remains professional and resilient.
Use Claude Code to document your 'why' behind complex fixes directly into the code comments for future-proofing.
When stuck, force a 'clean build' cycle to rule out stale cache issues before diving into deep architectural debugging.
content.next_steps: Once your app is stable, deploy it to Vercel or Netlify and integrate automated performance monitoring to catch regressions before your users do.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student writing code; you are an engineer building systems. Master these workflows, and your portfolio will stand out to every recruiter you encounter. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
